form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Sr3) over 1635m at Temora, beaten 25 m by Our Ultimate Bonny (2:00.90) in NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $15. Has the inside gate and is a leading player again.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 14 days ago at Junee over 1760m, and two back was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1760m at Junee beaten 19 m by Ronzel Sonny (2:12.90) in NR 40 to 40 on March 17 at $61. Can show more from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to be issued 60m.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after two weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when was well back in the run when 9th (Fr6) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 22 m by Letsgo Matilda (2:11.50) in NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $51. Improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced during the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr5) over 2100m at Young beaten 23 m by Tulhurst Pebbles (2:38.90) in NR up to 45 on April 10 at $11. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 1635m after showing early pace at Temora, at the bell was 3rd-3.8 beaten 5 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $1.90. Can mix the form but is chance with her A-game.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room leaving the 400m when Shes Got A Reason shifted in.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr3) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway beaten 35 m by Feelgood Ray (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on April 4 at $7. The run previous was well back in the run when 5th (Fr7) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 9th-21.8 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Kristysgirl (2:05.30) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $41. Expecting a much better run this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up over the latter stages of event.
Held up for clear running over the concluding stages of the race.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 6th-9.4 beaten 13 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $19. At the run before 10th (Fr3) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 30 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $61. This looks a suitable assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the 600m as a result of Georges World giving ground.
Checked passing the 500m as a result of Illustration tiring from the event.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 9th (Sr4) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 9th-20 beaten 15 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $41. Before that broke in score up and was out of position at the start 8th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee beaten 35 m by Ronzel Sonny (2:12.90) in NR 40 to 40 on March 17 at $61. Must do a lot more.

Broke gait during the score-up. Tired over the concluding stages of the event.
Galloped out. Raced roughly at various stages of the event.
Broke in the score up and out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr8) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 30 m by Kristysgirl (2:05.30) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $101. At the previous start 6th (Fr3) over 1758m at this track, beaten 30 m by The Banker (2:09.60) in NR 36 to 40 on March 10 at $3. Can do much better here.
